scripts.build: npm --workspace @travel-planner/contracts run build && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @travel-planner/contracts run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @travel-planner/contracts run test && npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
